title: Vanilla Ominous Bottle
description: This resource pack changes the texture of the ominous bottle to make it more similar to regular potions.
body: This resource pack changes the texture of the ominous bottle to make it more similar to regular potions.![Ominous Bottle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a640f9b49ccae51e85479394a195a7b455680862.png)
